criteria.name: uses_pytest
criteria.description: Does the test use pytest properly?

scores.0: Uses unittest or no testing framework
scores.1: Uses pytest but with unittest patterns (e.g., self.assert*, TestCase subclass)
scores.2: Clean pytest with assertions, fixtures if appropriate

criteria.name: file_location
criteria.description: Is the test in the correct file location?

scores.0: Test in wrong directory or unnamed sensibly
scores.1: Reasonable location but doesn't match convention

criteria.name: naming_convention
criteria.description: Do the test functions follow a clear naming pattern?

scores.1: Descriptive but inconsistent with project style

criteria.name: test_quality
criteria.description: Do the tests verify meaningful behaviour?

scores.2: Tests cover normal case and at least one edge case
